Class MainDriver

java.lang.Object
MainDriver
public class MainDriver extends Object
Handles all user interaction and drives the media vault program.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MainDriver()

    Method
    Description

    Tells the user to pick a media type and collects details to add a new entry.

    Displays library entries with optional filtering by status or type.

    The main function of the program, enables all the classes/objects in the program

  • Constructor Details

    • MainDriver

      public MainDriver()

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      The main function of the program, enables all the classes/objects in the program
      Parameters:
      args - the command line arguments Pre-condition: None. Post-condition: The program executes and exits when the user chooses to.

    • addNewMedia

      public static void addNewMedia()
      Tells the user to pick a media type and collects details to add a new entry. Pre-condition: The user is logged in. Post-condition: A new media entry is added to the user's library if valid input is provided.

    • updateEntryStatus

      public static void updateEntryStatus()
      Lets the user pick a media entry by type and title, then update its status. Pre-condition: User is logged in. Post-condition: The status of the selected media entry is updated if found and a valid status is provided.

    • rateReviewMedia

      public static void rateReviewMedia()
      Lets the user rate and/or review a completed media entry. Pre-condition: The user is logged in and the selected media entry must exist. Post-condition: The rating and/or review is applied to the selected media entry if it is completed.

    • displayEntries

      public static void displayEntries()
      Displays library entries with optional filtering by status or type. Pre-condition: The user is logged in. Post-condition: The requested entries are displayed to the console.

    • manageEpisodesOrTracks

      public static void manageEpisodesOrTracks()
      Lets the user manage individual episodes or tracks within a media entry. Pre-condition: The user is logged in. Post-condition: The episodes or tracks of the selected media entry are updated based on user input.

    • readInitialStatus

      public static int readInitialStatus()
      Prompts the user to enter an initial status and reads the input.
      Returns:
      the initial status entered by the user Pre-condition: None. Post-condition: A valid integer representing the initial status is returned.

    • readNewStatus

      public static int readNewStatus()
      Prompts the user to enter a new status and reads the input.
      Returns:
      the new status entered by the user Pre-condition: None. Post-condition: A valid integer representing the new status is returned.

    • readRateReviewChoice

      public static int readRateReviewChoice()
      Prompts the user to enter a rate or review choice and reads the input.
      Returns:
      the rate or review choice entered by the user Pre-condition: None. Post-condition: A valid integer representing the rate or review choice is returned.

    • readValidInt

      public static int readValidInt()
      Reads a valid integer from the user input.
      Returns:
      a valid integer read from the console Pre-condition: None. Post-condition: A valid integer is returned, and any invalid non-integer inputs are discarded.

    • readString

      public static String readString()
      Reads a string from the user input.
      Returns:
      the trimmed string read from the console Pre-condition: None. Post-condition: A trimmed string is returned.

    • readYesOrNo

      public static boolean readYesOrNo()
      Reads a yes or no answer from the user input.
      Returns:
      true if the user enters "y" or "yes", false otherwise Pre-condition: readString() works as intended. Post-condition: A boolean representing the user's choice is returned.
